summary: Frontend testing of BookingModal redesign on mobile (390x844) and code review of PlanningPage category tabs. All BookingModal features verified working correctly - services grouped by category with horizontal tabs, fixed action button always visible at bottom, step navigation, promo tab functionality.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' in operator select dropdown - caused by Emergent visual editor wrapping, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: MOBILE (390x844): BookingModal opens from bottom as a bottom sheet
MOBILE: Category tabs container visible with horizontal scroll (scrollbar-hide)
MOBILE: Found 11 category tabs (Taglio, Piega, Styling, Altro, Trattamento, Colore, Modellanti, Abbonamenti, Prodotti, Promo, etc.)
MOBILE: Clicking different categories (taglio, piega, colore, trattamento) shows only services from that category
MOBILE: Service selection shows compact summary chips with totals (e.g., '1 selezionati 10 min · €10')
MOBILE: 'Scegli data e ora' button fixed at bottom at y=680px (within 844px viewport height)
MOBILE: Promo tab shows 7 promotions with descriptions and promo codes
MOBILE: Step 1 → Step 2 navigation works correctly
MOBILE: Step 2 shows 49 time slots in grid format
MOBILE: Step 2 → Step 3 navigation works correctly
MOBILE: Step 3 shows confirmation form with summary (date, services, total)
MOBILE: Confirm button visible on Step 3
MOBILE: Back navigation (Step 3 → Step 2 → Step 1) works correctly
MOBILE: Service deselection via chip X button works
CODE REVIEW: PlanningPage.jsx has category tabs in New Appointment dialog (lines 1505-1577)
CODE REVIEW: PlanningPage.jsx has category tabs in Edit Appointment dialog (lines 1977-2050)
CODE REVIEW: Both dialogs use CATEGORY_ORDER for consistent category ordering
CODE REVIEW: _activeCat field is properly stripped before API calls (lines 349, 510)
critical_code_review_comments: BookingModal redesign successfully fixes mobile usability - services now grouped by category with horizontal tabs instead of long vertical list
Fixed footer with 'Scegli data e ora' button ensures confirmation action is always accessible without scrolling
PlanningPage appointment dialogs mirror the same category-tabbed approach for consistency
scrollbar-hide utility class correctly hides scrollbar while maintaining scroll functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: BookingModal redesign verified working on mobile viewport. Category tabs allow services to be grouped by category with horizontal scroll. Fixed footer keeps action button always visible. PlanningPage dialogs have same category tabs but admin login via Playwright automation was challenging (kept redirecting to login) - API auth works fine via curl. The _activeCat field is UI-only state that gets stripped before API calls.
